/.src/globalFetch_preview.ts(4,24): warning TS377061: Prefer using HttpClient from @effect/platform instead of the global 'fetch' function. effect(globalFetch)

    // @effect-diagnostics *:off
    // @effect-diagnostics globalFetch:warning
    
    export const preview = fetch("https://example.com")

!!! warning TS377061: Prefer using HttpClient from @effect/platform instead of the global 'fetch' function. effect(globalFetch)
